Charlie and the Chocolate Factory (2005)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $206,459,076Details
International Box Office $269,366,408
Worldwide Box Office $475,825,484
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$56,178,450 (27.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.68 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,770 opening theaters/3,790 max. theaters, 7.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $385,218,492

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 15th, 2005 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
July 15th, 2005 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: July 29th, 2005 (Wide), released as Charlie And The Chocolate Factory (United Kingdom)
August 5th, 2005 (Wide), released as Charlie und die Schokoladenfabrik (Germany)
August 20th, 2025 (Limited), released as Charlie and the Chocolate Factory (찰리와 초콜릿 공장) (South Korea)
December 2nd, 2025 (Special Engagement), released as Charlie und die Schokoladenfabrik (Germany)
Video Release: November 8th, 2005 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for quirky situations, action and mild language.
Running Time: 115 minutes
Franchise: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake, Visual Effects
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Food, Poverty, Rags to Riches, Spoiled Child
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Village Roadshow Productions, Warner Bros., Zancuk Company, Plan B Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
